originalTitle: Is JAX fast? Quick dev stream testing YT + X
title: Testing JAX RL Library Performance and Dependency Issues
summary: Evaluated Kevin Frans' JAX-based RL library, encountering dependency conflicts and broken packages. Compared speed against PyTorch/PufferLib, finding no performance advantage and criticizing JAX's code complexity. Also demonstrated a high-speed multi-agent snake environment achieving 14 million steps per second in pure Python.
